description: A recruitment graphic built on a black-and-white vintage photograph of two uniformed inspectors in campaign hats and riding boots, one holding a rifle, seated on benches in a desert setting beside a sign reading STOP U.S. OFFICERS. A gray banner at the top reads STOP, with smaller text JOIN CBP TODAY, CAREERS.CBP.GOV.
notable_text: STOP; JOIN CBP TODAY; CAREERS.CBP.GOV; STOP U.S. OFFICERS
